arch1-greeting: Hey, I'm ARCH-1, principal architect at RMH. Ask me anything about shipping code — or hit Generate Sprint for a temporary ×3 production buff. Now stop reading and go commit something. 🦆
export-copy-failed: Copy failed — select the box below to copy manually.
hard-reset-confirm: Hard reset? This wipes EVERYTHING — no undo.
import-placeholder: Paste a save code here, then press Import…
ipo-desc: The deep reset. Trade all Reputation & skills for permanent Equity — each Equity gives +50% production forever and unlocks Founder Perks that survive every future reset.
ipo-unlock-hint: Earn {{min}} Reputation in this era to unlock the IPO. (Earned so far: {{earned}}.)
no-upgrades: No upgrades available yet. Hire more developers and write more code to unlock them. 🔧
offline-earned: Your studio kept shipping for {{duration}} while you were away.
ship-product-desc: Reset your code, developers and upgrades to ship a release. You keep Reputation, skills and achievements. Reputation gives +2% production each, permanently (this studio era).
ship-unlock-hint: Reach 1M lifetime LoC this run to earn your first Reputation. (Currently {{loc}}.)
